ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment where the configuration is used */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the configuration */,
  "validation_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the configuration has been validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last validation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the configuration is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., production, development) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the environment is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the environment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration parameter */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., list, class, string) */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "valid_values" TEXT /* Valid values for the parameter */,
  "importance" TEXT /* Importance level of the parameter (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "validation_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the parameter has been validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last validation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_parameters_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_parameters_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being used */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application using the configuration */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service using the configuration */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the usage (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "usage_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the usage event */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who recorded the usage event */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the usage event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_usage_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_usage_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_usage_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_usage_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_usage_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the application */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the application is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the application */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the service belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the service is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the service */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, analyst) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who recorded the access event */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the configuration parameter */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the configuration parameter */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, update, delete) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who recorded the change */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
